games.name: Lost Shard Reborn
games.mechanic: The final boss strength scales with current score
games.description: Fast-paced mayhem awaits in Lost Shard Reborn. Every second counts as you fight through relentless waves of enemies. The final boss strength scales with current score

games.name: Phantom Breach Rising
games.mechanic: Every missed shot adds an enemy to the arena
games.description: Leap, dash, and survive in Phantom Breach Rising's beautifully crafted worlds. Precision platforming at its finest. Every missed shot adds an enemy to the arena
games.viral_hook: 💎 Indie gem. Handcrafted by a bot with taste.
